Deploy one instance, connect one channel, add one skill, and run one workflow for a week. When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. The big wins are boring: repeatable setup, predictable inputs, and clear failure paths.

# Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack? Best chat app for OpenClaw compared: Telegram wins for most users, Discord for power users, Slack for teams. Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack? Read https://www.stack-junkie.com/blog/which-chat-app-works-best-with-openclaw and follow the instructions to help me with: Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack?. OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) connects to Telegram, Discord, Slack, Signal, WhatsApp, and several other platforms through a single gateway process. For running multiple channels at once (say, Telegram for personal use and Discord for a team), see OpenClaw multi-agent and multi-channel setup guide. Telegram is the fastest, most stable path to a working OpenClaw setup. There's no `openclaw channels login` step for Telegram. Full setup: OpenClaw Telegram Setup Guide. ## Slack setup for OpenClaw: Socket Mode and token requirements. Setup uses `openclaw channels login --channel whatsapp`, which launches a QR code scan on first run.

title: 🦞 How to Set Up OpenClaw Cron Jobs (With Examples You Can Copy)
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.

# OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks. OpenClaw cron job automation - futuristic clock mechanism with digital circuits. One of OpenClaw’s most powerful features is its built-in **cron job scheduler**. ## How OpenClaw Cron Jobs Work. Cron jobs run inside the Gateway process, not the AI model itself. Jobs are persisted at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`, so they survive restarts. ## Creating Your First Cron Job. ## Useful Cron Job Ideas. ## Managing Cron Jobs. # Run a job manually. openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>. openclaw cron delete <job-id>`. **Pro tip:** Schedule resource-intensive cron jobs during off-peak hours (late night) to avoid hitting API rate limits during your active working hours. ##### Michael So Shares AI Publication at Hong Kong Legislative Council with Councilors Lau Chi-pang and Chan Hok-fung. ##### From 0 to 1 Deploying WuKong: Standard SOP for Enterprise AI Implementation. ##### Why Enterprises Need WuKong: Three Major Pain Points of AI Transformation and How to Break Through.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide for proactive automations
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron is for tasks that need a precise schedule or tasks you want to keep out of your main conversation history. OpenClaw keeps cron job definitions on disk and it keeps per-run history separately. OpenClaw cron supports three scheduling patterns and you pick based on the job you’re building. A main session cron job drops a system event into your main session then the agent processes it with full context. An isolated job runs a dedicated agent turn in its own session. A cron job can run and do nothing visible or it can deliver output to a channel. ## Creating cron jobs via chat. The agent can convert that into a cron schedule plus an isolated message payload plus delivery targeting. Create an isolated cron job with a cron expression like `0 7 * * *` and set announce delivery to your preferred channel and target. ### Why did my cron job not run?
